name: okpack-example-feed-fetch
prompt: okpack-example feed pull: fetch the example OPML into raw/example/ for the ingest lane. Pure script, wakeAgent=false.

name: okpack-example-daily-brief
prompt: Daily example brief. Your FIRST response MUST be a tool call: file_read on wiki/HOT.md (the derived load-first set: recent sources, recently-updated entities, open predictions). Then write today's brief to wiki/briefings/<YYYY-MM-DD>.md (frontmatter: type: dashboard, title, published: <YYYY-MM-DD> — published drives tier recency) summarizing the 3-5 most significant developments, each 2-3 sentences with [[wikilinks]] to the entities + their source. Expert-grade and terse; skip 101 explanation. LOCAL-ONLY: do not use web tools.
